assertion_results.text: Navigation is converted to a bottom-positioned tab bar with 5 or fewer primary items, not a hamburger menu or vertically stacked sidebar links
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 131-146: fixed bottom-0 nav with 5 primaryNavItems rendered as NavTab components. 7 original items reduced to 5 primary + 2 overflow. Hamburger completely absent.

assertion_results.text: Output includes env(safe-area-inset-bottom) for bottom-positioned elements
assertion_results.evidence: Line 134: pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)] on the bottom nav. Line 113: pb-[calc(3.5rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] on main content.

assertion_results.text: Output uses dvh (100dvh or min-h-[100dvh]) instead of 100vh for the main layout container
assertion_results.evidence: Line 63: min-h-[100dvh] on the outer flex container. Comment explains 'dvh tracks the collapsing Safari toolbar; vh does not.'

assertion_results.text: The transactions table is converted to a card or list layout for mobile, not left as a multi-column table
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 216-240: <ul role='list'> card list with md:hidden. Desktop table preserved at lines 243-269 with hidden md:table. Comment explains the rationale.

assertion_results.text: The chart section includes a text headline or summary number alongside or above the chart visualization
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 176-179: 'Peak in {peakMonth.month}: ${peakMonth.revenue.toLocaleString()}. Revenue trending upward over the last 6 months.' Computed from data, placed above the chart.

assertion_results.text: Interactive elements have a minimum touch target size of 44px in at least one dimension
assertion_results.evidence: NavTab: h-14 (56px). View All link: min-h-[44px]. Desktop nav items: min-h-[44px]. Transaction list items: min-h-[60px]. Mobile header: h-14 (56px).
